ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cemeteries" (
  "cemetery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cemetery */,
  "cemetery_name" TEXT /* Name of the cemetery or memorial */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the cemetery is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cemetery (city, state, etc.) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of memorial (e.g., cemetery, monument, plaque) */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the memorial was established */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the memorial */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the memorial's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the memorial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cemetery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cemeteries_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "flag_image" TEXT /* URL or file path to the country's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "conflict_name" TEXT /* Name of the conflict */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conflict */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conflict */,
  "causes" TEXT /* Causes of the conflict */,
  "consequences" TEXT /* Consequences of the conflict */,
  "participating_countries" TEXT /* Countries that participated in the conflict */,
  "total_casualties" INTEGER /* Total number of casualties in the conflict */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the military branch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the military branch */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the branch was established */,
  "logo_image" TEXT /* URL or file path to the branch's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the military rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the rank within the military */,
  "symbol_image" TEXT /* URL or file path to the rank's symbol image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualties" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casualty */,
  "cemetery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cemetery or memorial where the casualty is buried or commemorated */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict associated with the casualty */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the military branch associated with the casualty */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the military rank associated with the casualty */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the casualty */,
  "life_story" TEXT /* Life story of the casualty (text or link) */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the casualty (file path or link) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the casualty */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the casualty */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the casualty */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place of death of the casualty */,
  "service_number" TEXT /* Service number of the casualty */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Military awards received by the casualty */,
  "family_info" TEXT /* Information about the family of the casualty */,
  "memorialized_at" TEXT /* Additional memorials where the casualty is commemorated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualties_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualties_cemetery_id FOREIGN KEY ("cemetery_id") REFERENCES cemeteries ("cemetery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualties_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualties_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life story */,
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the casualty associated with the life story */,
  "story_text" TEXT /* Text of the life story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_stories_casualty_id FOREIGN KEY ("casualty_id") REFERENCES casualties ("casualty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the casualty associated with the image */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_casualty_id FOREIGN KEY ("casualty_id") REFERENCES casualties ("casualty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, search, view casualty) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualty_conflicts" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the casualty */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id", "conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualty_branches" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the casualty */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id", "branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualty_ranks" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the casualty */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id", "rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
